checks.detail: AG74O must own the public Panchang runtime.
Version-pinned local Astronomy Engine browser bundle must load.
Panchang inputs must not be persisted.
Selection status must be a polite live region.
Panchang card must expose aria-busy.
Default Varanasi/today calculation must complete automatically.
Varanasi must remain the governed dropdown default.
Legacy pilot quick-pick location buttons must not remain visible after dropdown activation.
Result must identify local browser calculation.
Unreviewed candidates must not display as festival dates.
Exactly one visible daily Panchang result surface must exist. Observed total=1, visible=1
Legacy AG71E Panchang panel must remain hidden, inert and absent from layout.
Panchang and observance result ids must be unique. Duplicates=[]
Varanasi 13/06/2026 must calculate deterministically.
Expected Nakshatra must render.
Expected Yoga must render.
Expected Karana must render.
Previous and next transition must render.
Next Day must calculate the next civil date.
Keyboard focus must move to the updated status after explicit navigation.
Previous Day must restore the prior civil date.

Curated Tokyo governed-dropdown synchronization observed: {"selectValue":"tokyo-japan","safeSelected":"true","safeButtonText":"Tokyo","locationText":"Tokyo · Asia/Tokyo","resultState":"calculated","controller":{"stateValue":"tokyo-japan","selectValue":"tokyo-japan","safeSelectValue":"tokyo-japan","safeSelectText":"Tokyo","requestValue":"tokyo-japan","requestLabel":"Tokyo","resultState":"calculated","locationText":"Tokyo · Asia/Tokyo"}}
Coordinate-first calculation must complete with supplied IANA timezone.
Invalid coordinates must produce governed unavailable state.
Annual book must populate twelve canonical slots.
Annual book must retain four pages.
Selected Jyeshtha date must open page 1.
Adhika and Nija instances must be represented.
Direct annual-book page navigation must work.

Panchang card and controls must remain within 1280px viewport. Editorial Panchang headings must use Cambria.

Panchang labels, explanatory copy and controls must use Arial. Observed: {"labelFont":"Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif","bodyCopyFont":"Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif","controlFont":"Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif"}
Georgia must remain the first font only on the principal Drishvara wordmark. Observed: Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif
Request-token latest-result-only guard must be active.
Every runtime script must be served from the same local origin; no external ephemeris API or script may be used.
No public method selector may be introduced.
Automatic rendering must not expose or require a visible Generate button.
